sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 30:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 30:1
items.html: They end equally with the Sium Raglayim of AB of AK because the male, which is clothed in the vessel of Keter, which is tastes, has the level of Hochma, like AB. It, too, like AB, cannot shine to the bottom Hey below the Tabur. (Inner Light, Item 1)
